subject: [PATCH v5 11/21] nfsd: add tracepoint to dir_event handler

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a tracepoint to the dir_event handler in the NFS server (nfsd) code, providing extra visibility into how fsnotify handlers are being called. The new tracepoint is named nfsd_handle_dir_event and it captures information about the directory event, including the mask of events triggered, the inode involved, and the name of the file or directory affected. This addition will help with debugging and understanding the behavior of the NFS server when handling directory events.
